data.description_suggestion: Creates a new custom meme template by uploading an image and defining text line positions. Accepts an image file and configuration for text overlay areas. Returns a template object with a unique template id that can be used for subsequent meme generation. Custom templates are stored and can be reused for creating multiple memes.
data.reasoning: Summary is identical to postImagesCreateCustom, causing confusion about the distinction between creating a meme image versus creating a reusable template. Changed summary to clarify this is template creation. Added description explaining the template creation process, configuration requirements, return value (template object with id), and persistence for reuse.

message: Operation 'getTemplatesDetail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about required input (template id), comprehensive output fields (id, name, lines, styles, URLs, source), and use case to help AI agents understand what information is available and when to call this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed metadata for a specific meme template. Requires the template id as a path parameter. Returns a template object containing id, name, number of text lines, available styles, blank image URL, example meme with text, and source reference. Use this to get template details before generating memes.
